legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Lebanon / لبنان. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Lebanon / لبنان. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Lebanon}} Hashish banned in 1926;<ref name="Clarke1998">{{cite book|author=Robert Connell Clarke|title=Hashish!|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=hblBKeAE9rgC|year=1998|publisher=Red Eye Press|isbn=978-0-929349-05-3}}</ref> cultivation banned in 1992.<ref>{{cite book|title=Réalités|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=yPU7AQAAIAAJ|date=May 1996|publisher=Spectacle du monde|page=354|quote=Les Américains ne lâchant pas prise, le gouvernement libanais interdisait officiellement la culture du pavot et du cannabis en 1992.}}</ref> Large amounts of cannabis are still grown within the country illicitly, however.<ref>{{citation |url = https://www.csmonitor.com/2007/1016/p06s02-wome.html |title = In Lebanon, a comeback for cannabis |work = [[The Christian Science Monitor]] |date = 16 October 2007 |access-date = 17 February 2011 |archive-date = 20 April 2019 |archive-url = https://web.archive.org/web/20190420011630/https://www.csmonitor.com/2007/1016/p06s02-wome.html |url-status = live }}</ref> Cultivation of cannabis for medical use was legalized in April 2020.<ref>{{cite news |url = https://www.nytimes.com/reuters/2020/04/21/world/middleeast/21reuters-lebanon-crisis-cannabis.html | title = Lebanon Legalizes Cannabis Farming for Medicinal Use | work = [[The New York Times]] | agency = [[Reuters]] | date = 21 April 2020 | archive-url = https://web.archive.org/web/20200423112646/https://www.nytimes.com/reuters/2020/04/21/world/middleeast/21reuters-lebanon-crisis-cannabis.html | archive-date = 23 April 2020 | url-status=dead }}</ref>

facts.cultivation: grown within the country illicitly, however.
